---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement (please discuss before opening a PR)
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement, needs-design
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who has it?

## Proposed solution

How would this work for the user?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you thought about?

## Implementation notes (optional)

Technical considerations, links to similar implementations elsewhere, etc.

## Acceptance criteria

How will we know this is done?
